
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":[]},{"id":"2","path":["employee"]},{"id":"3","path":["employee"]},{"id":"4","path":["employee"]},{"id":"5","path":["teammates"]},{"id":"6","path":["teammates"]},{"id":"7","path":["teammates"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"employee":{},"teammates":[{},{}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":["FINANCE","HUMAN_RESOURCES","MARKETING"]},"id":"7","subPath":[0]},{"data":{"products":["FINANCE"]},"id":"7","subPath":[1]}],"completed":[{"id":"7"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"id":1},"id":"2"}],"completed":[{"id":"2"}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"id":4},"id":"5","subPath":[0]},{"data":{"id":11},"id":"5","subPath":[1]}],"completed":[{"id":"5"}],"hasNext":true}

Content-Type: application/json

Content-Type: application/json
